languages.text: Века назад Себериан фон Валанциус отправился к руинам, сокрытым в корневой системе мира. Возможно, его тело до сих пор лежит там, моля об упокоении в династическом кенотафе. Как только Лорд-капитан вернется на флагман, {mf|ему|ей} следует просканировать предполагаемое место гибели Себериана с помощью авгуров.

traits.locale_text: Века назад Себериан фон Валанциус отправился к руинам, сокрытым в корневой системе мира. Возможно, его тело до сих пор лежит там, моля об упокоении в династическом кенотафе. Как только Лорд-капитан вернется на флагман, {mf|ему|ей} следует просканировать предполагаемое место гибели Себериана с помощью авгуров.

languages.text: Centuries ago, Seberian von Valancius journeyed into the ruins hidden within the world's root system. It is possible that his body still lies there, awaiting repose within a dynastic cenotaph. As soon as the Lord Captain returns to the flagship, {mf|he|she} should scan the presumed site of Seberian's demise using augurs.

Centuries ago, Seberian von Valancius journeyed into the ruins hidden within the world's root system. It is possible that his body still lies there, begging for repose within a dynastic cenotaph. As soon as the Lord Captain returns to the flagship, {mf|he|she} should scan the presumed site of Seberian's demise using augurs.

languages.text: 数百年前に、シベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウスは世界樹の根元にある遺跡へと旅立った。そして、その旅から彼は帰らなかった。彼の遺体は、今もなおその遺跡に眠り、王家の墓に埋葬されることを願っているのかもしれない。
languages.original_text: Centuries ago, Seberian von Valancius travelled to the ruins hidden in the world's root system. And he never returned from that expedition. Perhaps his body languishes there still, pleading to be laid to rest in the dynasty's mausoleum.

traits.locale_text: 数百年前に、シベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウスは世界樹の根元にある遺跡へと旅立った。そして、その旅から彼は帰らなかった。彼の遺体は、今もなおその遺跡に眠り、王家の墓に埋葬されることを願っているのかもしれない。

languages.text: Hace siglos, Seberian von Valancius se adentró en las ruinas ocultas entre las raíces del mundo. Es posible que su cuerpo siga allí, aguardando el momento de reposar en un cenotafio de la dinastía. En cuanto {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán vuelva a la nave insignia, debería usar a los augures para investigar el presunto lugar de muerte de Seberian.
languages.original_text: Centuries ago, Seberian von Valancius journeyed into the ruins hidden within the world's root system. It is possible that his body still lies there, awaiting repose within a dynastic cenotaph. As soon as the Lord Captain returns to the flagship, {mf|he|she} should scan the presumed site of Seberian's demise using augurs.

traits.locale_text: Hace siglos, Seberian von Valancius se adentró en las ruinas ocultas entre las raíces del mundo. Es posible que su cuerpo siga allí, aguardando el momento de reposar en un cenotafio de la dinastía. En cuanto {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán vuelva a la nave insignia, debería usar a los augures para investigar el presunto lugar de muerte de Seberian.

languages.text: Vor Hunderten von Jahren reiste Seberian von Valancius zu den im Wurzelsystem der Welt verborgenen Ruinen. Möglicherweise liegt seine Leiche noch immer dort und wartet auf ihre Bestattung in einem dynastischen Ehrenmal. Nach seiner Rückkehr auf das Flaggschiff sollte der Lord Captain den vermutlichen Ort von Seberians Ende schnellstens mit Auguren scannen.
languages.original_text: Centuries ago, Seberian von Valancius journeyed into the ruins hidden within the world's root system. It is possible that his body still lies there, awaiting repose within a dynastic cenotaph. As soon as the Lord Captain returns to the flagship, {mf|he|she} should scan the presumed site of Seberian's demise using augurs.

traits.locale_text: Vor Hunderten von Jahren reiste Seberian von Valancius zu den im Wurzelsystem der Welt verborgenen Ruinen. Möglicherweise liegt seine Leiche noch immer dort und wartet auf ihre Bestattung in einem dynastischen Ehrenmal. Nach seiner Rückkehr auf das Flaggschiff sollte der Lord Captain den vermutlichen Ort von Seberians Ende schnellstens mit Auguren scannen.

languages.text: Il y a plusieurs siècles, Seberian von Valancius a exploré les ruines dissimulées au cœur des racines de ce monde. Il est possible que son corps y soit encore, attendant de trouver le repos dans un cénotaphe dynastique. Dès son retour à bord du vaisseau amiral, {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} devrait utiliser les augures pour se mettre en quête des lieux où Seberian aurait trouvé la mort.
languages.original_text: Centuries ago, Seberian von Valancius journeyed into the ruins hidden within the world's root system. It is possible that his body still lies there, awaiting repose within a dynastic cenotaph. As soon as the Lord Captain returns to the flagship, {mf|he|she} should scan the presumed site of Seberian's demise using augurs.

traits.locale_text: Il y a plusieurs siècles, Seberian von Valancius a exploré les ruines dissimulées au cœur des racines de ce monde. Il est possible que son corps y soit encore, attendant de trouver le repos dans un cénotaphe dynastique. Dès son retour à bord du vaisseau amiral, {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} devrait utiliser les augures pour se mettre en quête des lieux où Seberian aurait trouvé la mort.

languages.text: 数个世纪前，塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯曾深入这颗行星根系深处的遗迹。也许他的尸骨还在那里，等待被安葬进王朝纪念陵墓。舰长大人返回旗舰后，应立即使用俄歇矩阵，扫描疑似为塞贝里安葬身处的地点。
languages.original_text: Centuries ago, Seberian von Valancius journeyed into the ruins hidden within the world's root system. It is possible that his body still lies there, awaiting repose within a dynastic cenotaph. As soon as the Lord Captain returns to the flagship, {mf|he|she} should scan the presumed site of Seberian's demise using augurs.

traits.locale_text: 数个世纪前，塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯曾深入这颗行星根系深处的遗迹。也许他的尸骨还在那里，等待被安葬进王朝纪念陵墓。舰长大人返回旗舰后，应立即使用俄歇矩阵，扫描疑似为塞贝里安葬身处的地点。

languages.text: Yüzyıllar önce Seberian von Valancius, dünyanın kök sistemi içinde gizlenmiş harabelere doğru yola çıktı. Bedeninin hâlâ orada yatıyor olması, hanedanlığın bir anıt mezarında huzur bulmayı bekliyor olması muhtemel. Lord Kaptan, sancak gemisine döner dönmez Seberian'ın can verdiği varsayılan yeri alametleri kullanarak taramalı.
languages.original_text: Centuries ago, Seberian von Valancius journeyed into the ruins hidden within the world's root system. It is possible that his body still lies there, awaiting repose within a dynastic cenotaph. As soon as the Lord Captain returns to the flagship, {mf|he|she} should scan the presumed site of Seberian's demise using augurs.
